endpoints.name: Retrieve list of balance transfers
endpoints.description: Retrieve a list of balance transfers that have taken place for a primary account within a specified time period.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NEXMO_USERNAME}} with your NEXMO USERNAME. Replace {{NEXMO_PASSWORD}} with your NEXMO PASSWORD. Replace {{API_KEY}} with a real api_key.

endpoints.name: Transfer balance
endpoints.description: Transfer balance between a primary account and one of its subaccounts. Note that balance_available_for_transfer = |account_balance - credit_limit| of the source account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NEXMO_USERNAME}} with your NEXMO USERNAME. Replace {{NEXMO_PASSWORD}} with your NEXMO PASSWORD. Replace {{API_KEY}} with a real api_key.

endpoints.name: Retrieve list of credit transfers
endpoints.description: Retrieve a list of credit transfers that have taken place for a primary account within a specified time period.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NEXMO_USERNAME}} with your NEXMO USERNAME. Replace {{NEXMO_PASSWORD}} with your NEXMO PASSWORD. Replace {{API_KEY}} with a real api_key.

endpoints.name: Transfer credit
endpoints.description: Transfer credit limit between a primary account and one of its subaccounts.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NEXMO_USERNAME}} with your NEXMO USERNAME. Replace {{NEXMO_PASSWORD}} with your NEXMO PASSWORD. Replace {{API_KEY}} with a real api_key.

endpoints.name: Retrieve list of subaccounts
endpoints.description: Get the information of all the subaccounts owned by the primary account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NEXMO_USERNAME}} with your NEXMO USERNAME. Replace {{NEXMO_PASSWORD}} with your NEXMO PASSWORD. Replace {{API_KEY}} with a real api_key.

endpoints.name: Create subaccount
endpoints.description: Create a subaccount for a given primary account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NEXMO_USERNAME}} with your NEXMO USERNAME. Replace {{NEXMO_PASSWORD}} with your NEXMO PASSWORD. Replace {{API_KEY}} with a real api_key.

endpoints.name: Retrieve a subaccount
endpoints.description: Get the information of a subaccount specified with its API key.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NEXMO_USERNAME}} with your NEXMO USERNAME. Replace {{NEXMO_PASSWORD}} with your NEXMO PASSWORD. Replace {{SUBACCOUNT_KEY}} with a real subaccount_key. Replace {{API_KEY}} with a real api_key.

endpoints.name: Modify a subaccount
endpoints.description: Change one or more properties of a subaccount.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NEXMO_USERNAME}} with your NEXMO USERNAME. Replace {{NEXMO_PASSWORD}} with your NEXMO PASSWORD. Replace {{SUBACCOUNT_KEY}} with a real subaccount_key. Replace {{API_KEY}} with a real api_key.

endpoints.name: Transfer number
endpoints.description: Transfer number from one account to another.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NEXMO_USERNAME}} with your NEXMO USERNAME. Replace {{NEXMO_PASSWORD}} with your NEXMO PASSWORD. Replace {{API_KEY}} with a real api_key.
